scripts.build: corepack pnpm --filter @eduadvisor/api build && corepack pnpm --filter @eduadvisor/web build
scripts.lint: corepack pnpm --filter @eduadvisor/api lint && corepack pnpm --filter @eduadvisor/web lint
scripts.test: corepack pnpm --filter @eduadvisor/api test && corepack pnpm --filter @eduadvisor/web test
scripts.ci:full: corepack pnpm lint && corepack pnpm test && corepack pnpm build
